mnemonics: CLICK for a GUI: Graphical User Interfaces Let Users Click-Kernel
keyPoints: The two primary interfaces are the Command-Line Interface (CLI) and the Graphical User Interface (GUI)
System calls provide a programming interface to the services of an operating system
The user interface and the system call interface are distinct layers; the UI programs (like a shell) use system calls to function
commonMistakes: Thinking the GUI is the operating system itself, rather than just a program running on top of it
Confusing the command-line interpreter (shell) with the operating system kernel
Believing users interact with system calls directly, instead of through utility programs or APIs
